name: Signal Over Noise
description: More information is not the goal; the goal is clearer prioritization and action.

name: Context Creates Intelligence
description: Data becomes useful when connected to purpose, history, ownership, confidence, and impact.

name: Systems Before Features
description: Understand the workflow, incentives, and decision structure before adding technology.

name: Trust Before Autonomy
description: Autonomy should increase only when evidence, observability, and accountability are credible.

name: Human Accountability
description: AI can support or execute decisions, but responsibility must remain explicit.

name: Feedback Loops
description: Systems must learn from outcomes and adjust behavior over time.

name: Decision Quality
description: The value of intelligence is measured by the quality and speed of decisions it enables.

name: Appropriate Autonomy
description: The objective is not maximum automation but the correct balance between agent and human control.
